title: Papa: 'WAIT — snacks!' comic dad-jog
prompt: Wide shot at @playground-park — playground equipment softly visible BACKGROUND, paved sidewalk in foreground, soft warm afternoon light. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME standing in place on the sidewalk with both feet planted, just realizing his daughters have taken off on their scooters, theatrical wide-eyed dad-expression with cheerful warm comedic surprise. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both raised softly in a 'wait!' gesture, palms open, at chest height. The sidewalk and playground stay plain clean throughout. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa's eyes go wide with cheerful comedic dad-realization — mouth open in a soft 'O' of warm surprise, both hands still raised softly at chest height. Papa (warm cheerful playful dad-call, NOT panicked, NOT scared, theatrical comedy): "Wait, wait, WAIT! What about the snacks?!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Papa softly bounces in place on his feet (gentle in-place bounce, not running off), both hands now softly cupped around his mouth like a megaphone. Papa (warm cheerful playful sing-song call): "Hold up! Daddy's coming, slow down a little, Daddy's got SNACKS!" Soft cheerful kid-show comedy ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Papa stays grounded with both feet on the sidewalk throughout — no running off-frame, no leaping, no chasing. The bounce-in-place is gentle and comedic.
